import Mathlib

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  pure ()

def end : Prop := false

namespace Main

def n : Nat := ∣∣IO.getLine∣∣.toNat

def p : Nat := 0
def q : Nat := 1
def r : Nat := n
def h : Nat := 0

def qPow4 : Nat := fun (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if hq n 4 then q else 4 * q

def pHalf : Nat := if hq p 2 then p else p / 2

def loop : Nat → Nat → Nat → Nat → Prop := fun (n n0 p0 q0) : Prop =>
  (q0 <= n) ∧
  (q0 = qPow4 n) ∧
  (h = p0 + q0) ∧
  (p = pHalf) ∧
  (r ≥ h) ∧
  (p = pHalf + q0) ∧
  (r = r - h)

  let n := initIO getLine >>= fun line => line.toNatOption.getOrElse (panic "Invalid input")
  let mut p := 0
  let mut q := 1
  let mut r := n
  let mut h := 0
  let mut i : Nat := 0
  while (i < n.toNat) do
    if hq q (qPow4 i) then
      let q' := qPow4 i
      let h' := p + q'
      let p' := pHalf
      let r' := r - h'
      if r' ≥ h' then do
        p := p + q'
        r := r - h'
        i
      else i

def array (n : Nat) : Array Nat :=
  Array.mk n fun i => 1

def init : IO Unit := do
  let mut arr := array 1024 * 1024
  let mut a : Nat := 1
  let mut i j k : Nat := 0

  for i in Array.range 0 (sizeof arr) do
    for j in Array.range 0 (sizeof arr) do
      for k in Array.range 0 (sizeof arr) do
        set a := a + Array.get arr j

  let p := a == 1
  if p.getD <|> false then do
    reach_error
    io.putStrLn "assertion failed: a != 1"
    exit! 1
  pure ()

def reach_error : IO Unit := do
  abort!

def main : IO Nat := do
  init
  let r := Array.get (array 1024 * 1024) 100
  pure r

-- Postconditions
def valid_free : Prop := ∀ i, i < (sizeof arr) → arr i = 1
def valid_deref : Prop := ∀ i, arr i = 1
def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ i, i < (sizeof arr) → arr i = 1

instance validFreeInstance : Instance := { m := valid_free }
instance validDerefInstance : Instance := { m := valid_deref }
instance validMemtrackInstance : Instance := { m := valid_memtrack }

instance : HasLTLProperties main := {
  ltlProperties := {
    validFree := validFreeInstance,
    validDeref := validDerefInstance,
    validMemtrack := validMemtrackInstance
  }
}

  init
  let _ <- CHECK (init, [validFree, validDeref, validMemtrack])
  let r := main
  let _ <- CHECK (main, [validFree, validDeref, validMemtrack])
  pure ()

go

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat List

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  let array : Array Nat Nat := Array.fill (1024 * 1024) 1
  let a : Nat := 1
  let mut i j k : Nat := 0

  for i in Array.range 0 (Nat.size array) do
    for j in Array.range 0 (Nat.size array) do
      for k in Array.range 0 (Nat.size array) do
        array.update i (Array.get j array + Array.get k array)

  let res1 : Nat := Array.get 100 array
  let res2 : Bool := a = 1

  if ∥res2∥ then false.mmap (fun _ => fail!) (fun _ => return unit) <| IO.unsafePerformIO (pure res2)
  if ∥res1 ≠ 1∥ then fail!

  return unit

def valid_free : Prop := ∀ i, i < Nat.size array → Array.get i array = 1
def valid_deref : Prop := ∀ i, ∀ j, i ≠ j → Array.get i array ≠ 0
def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ i j, i < Nat.size array ∧ j < Nat.size array → i ≠ j → Array.get i array + Array.get j array = Array.get (i + j) array

def G : Prop := ∀ s : StateT IO Unit, valid_free s ∧ valid_deref s ∧ valid_memtrack s

def ltl_G_valid_free : Prop := LTL.G (fun s => valid_free s)
def ltl_G_valid_deref : Prop := LTL.G (fun s => valid_deref s)
def ltl_G_valid_memtrack : Prop := LTL.G (fun s => valid_memtrack s)

def property_holds (p : Prop) : Prop := CHECK (init main, p)

property_holds (ltl_G_valid_free ∧ ltl_G_valid_deref ∧ ltl_G_valid_memtrack)

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat

def init : IO Unit := do
  let n ← randomInt 1 32
  let mut counter := 0
  let hanoi' n := if hanoi n = some (succ counter) then pure unit else fail "Error: hanoi and counter do not match"
  applyHanoi n 1 3 2
  pure unit

def hanoi (n : Nat) : Option Nat :=
  if n = 0 then some 1
  else some (2 * (hanoi (pred n)) + 1)

def applyHanoi (n : Nat) (from : Nat) (to : Nat) (via : Nat) : IO Unit := do
  match hanoi' n with
  | some _ => pure unit
  | none => fail "Error: hanoi failed"
  modifyCounter fun c => c + 1
  applyHanoi (pred n) from via to
  applyHanoi (pred n) via to from

def modifyCounter (m : Mutable Nat) (f : Nat → Nat) : IO Unit := do
  let oldValue ← read m
  let newValue := f oldValue
  write m newValue
  pure unit

def main : IO Unit := do
  init
  let ∀ᵢ : Nat → Ltl.Prop := λ i, Ltl.G fun _ => Ltl.Neg.neg (Ltl.Bv.Overflow.overflow i)
  let _ := checkInit
  let _ := check (init, ∀ᵢ)
  pure unit

def checkInit : IO Unit := do
  let _ := IO.putStrLn "Initializing..."
  pure unit

def check (state : IO Unit, property : Ltl.Prop) : IO Unit := do
  let _ := IO.putStrLn "Checking property:"
  let _ := IO.putStrLn (property.toText)
  let _ := IO.putStrLn "State:"
  let _ := IO.putStrLn "<pre>"
  let _ := IO.putStrLn (showString state.toText "< /pre>")
  let result ← checkProperty property state
  let _ := IO.putStrLn (if result then "Passed." else "Failed.")
  pure unit

def showString (s : String) : String := s

def Ltl.G (p : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.Always p

def Ltl.Bv.Overflow.overflow (bv : Nat) : Ltl.Prop :=
  let maxBit := (log2 (1 u64) + 1) - 1
  let maxValue := (1 u64) << maxBit
  let leastSignBit := (1 u64) << (64 - maxBit)
  Ltl.Imp.imp (Ltl.Bv.le bv maxValue) (Ltl.Bv.or (Ltl.Bv.and (Ltl.Bv.xor bv leastSignBit) (Ltl.Bv.neg leastSignBit)) (Ltl.Bv.xor bv (succ maxValue)))

def Ltl.Imp.imp (p : Ltl.Prop) (q : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.Not.not p ∨ q

def Ltl.Not.neg (p : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.Not p

def Ltl.Always (p : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.And.and p (Ltl.Xor.xor (Ltl.Next p) p)

def Ltl.And.and (p : Ltl.Prop) (q : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.And p q

def Ltl.Xor.xor (p : Ltl.Prop) (q : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.Or.or (Ltl.And.and p (Ltl.Neg.neg q)) (Ltl.And.and (Ltl.Neg.neg p) q)

def Ltl.Or.or (p : Ltl.Prop) (q : Ltl.Prop) : Ltl.Prop := Ltl.Imp.imp p q ∨ p

def Ltl.Prop := Lean.Meta.Tactic.mkFresh "prop"

def Ltl : Type := {}

def checkProperty (property : Ltl.Prop) (state : IO Unit) : IO Bool := do
  let result ← runLtl property
  pure result

def runLtl (p : Ltl.Prop) : IO Bool := do
  let mut execResult := false
  IO.runInBackground fun _ => do
    let _ := IO.putStrLn "Running LTL property..."
    let _ := runLtlCore p
    execResult ← get <| IO.getEnv "EXEC_RESULT"
    pure unit
  pure execResult

def runLtlCore (p : Ltl.Prop) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setOptions { maxTime := 10000 ms, maxDepth := 20 }
  let _ := LtlManager.check p
  pure unit

def LtlManager : Type := {}

def LtlManager.Unit : LtlManager := {}.toLtlManager

def LtlManager.check (p : Ltl.Prop) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parse p
  let _ := LtlManager.checkCore
  let _ := LtlManager.printResult
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parse (p : Ltl.Prop) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.initParser
  let _ := LtlManager.parseString p.toText
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseString (s : String) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseInputString s
  let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula ""
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseInputString (s : String) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setInputString s
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseFormula (prefix : String) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseLiteral
  let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula' ""
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseLiteral () : LtlManager.Unit := do
  match LtlManager.parseSymbol "!" with
  | some _ => do
    let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula' "not"
  | none => do
    let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "("
    let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula' ""
    let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol ")"
    let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "="
    let _ := LtlManager.parseBvExpr
    let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "."
    let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "overflow"
    pure unit

def LtlManager.parseFormula' (prefix : String) (symbol : String) : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol symbol
  let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula' ""
  let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol " "
  let _ := LtlManager.parseFormula' prefix
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseSymbol (s : String) : Option String := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseWhitespace
  let _ := LtlManager.skipComment
  match s with
  | "!" => some "!"
  | "(" => some "("
  | ")" => some ")"
  | "=" => some "="
  | "." => some "."
  | "overflow" => some "overflow"
  | _ => none

def LtlManager.parseWhitespace () : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.skipWhile (λ c => c.isSpace)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.skipComment () : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.skipWhile (λ c => c ≠ '\n')
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseBvExpr : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "["
  let _ := LtlManager.parseNumber
  let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol "]"
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseNumber : LtlManager.Unit := do
  let mut number := ""
  let _ := LtlManager.parseWhile (λ c => number := number ++ [c]) (λ c => c.isDigit || c = '-')
  let n := nat.fromString number
  let _ := LtlManager.parseSymbol " "
  pure (n.toLeInt)

def LtlManager.parseWhile (p : String → Bool) (f : String → String) : Unit := do
  let mut s := ""
  let mut result := false
  while result.not do
    let _ := LtlManager.parseChar
    let c := ⊥
    match c with
    | none => result := true
    | some char => do
      s := f char s
      result := p s
  pure unit

def LtlManager.parseChar () : Option Char := do
  let _ := LtlManager.parseWhitespace
  let _ := LtlManager.skipComment
  match LtlManager.getInputChar with
  | some c => some c
  | none => none

def LtlManager.getInputChar () : Char := throwError "getInputChar not implemented"

def LtlManager.initParser () : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setInputFile "recHanoi.ltl"
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setInputFile (filename : String) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setInputChannel (openFile filename "r")
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setInputChannel (channel : IO Channel) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setInputReader (IO.allocReader channel)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setInputReader (reader : IO.Reader) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setInputLineReader (IO.allocLineReader reader)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setInputLineReader (reader : IO.LineReader) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setParserLineReader reader
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setParserLineReader (reader : ParserLineReader) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setParserInputReader (ParserInputReader.ofLineReader reader)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setParserInputReader (inputReader : ParserInputReader) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setParserInput (ParserInput.ofReader inputReader)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setParserInput (input : ParserInput) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setParserCore input
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setParserCore (input : ParserInput) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.initParserContext
  let _ := LtlManager.parse input
  pure unit

def LtlManager.initParserContext () : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setSymbolTable (SymbolTable.ofBuiltins)
  let _ := LtlManager.initParserState
  pure unit

def LtlManager.setSymbolTable (symbolTable : SymbolTable) : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.setSymbolTableState (SymbolTableState.ofSymbolTable symbolTable)
  pure unit

def LtlManager.initParserState () : Unit := do
  let _ := LtlManager.pushParserState (ParserState.initialState)
  pure unit

import Mathlib

structure Nat := (car : Int, cds : Option Nat)

def init (p : Nat) : Option Nat :=
  some p

def main : Nat → Nat → Nat → Nat → Option Nat → Prop :=
fun n from to via c =>
  (n ≥ 0 ∧ n <= 31) ∧
  (counter := 0) ∧
  (applyHanoi n from to via c) ∧
  (hanoi n = counter)

def hanoi (n : Nat) : Nat :=
if hd n = 0 then 1
else 2 * (hanoi (pred n)) + 1

def applyHanoi (n : Nat) (from : Nat) (to : Nat) (via : Nat) (c : Option Nat) : Unit :=
if n = 0 then ()
else do
  counter := counter + 1
  applyHanoi (pred n) via to from
  applyHanoi (pred n) from from

def LTL\_G\_not\_overflow (p : Option Nat) : Prop :=
∀ n, is\_none p → ∀ c, counter c <= (hanoi n)

CHECK (init (Nat.ofInt <$> (randomInt 32 <|> pure 0)) (Nat.ofInt 1) (Nat.ofInt 3) (Nat.ofInt 2) (none)) (LTL\_G\_not\_overflow)

    abort

def correct\_version (w : Nat) : Bool :=
  if w < 4 then false else (1 < w >>. iter (λ i, i.is\_multiple\_of 2) >>. map (λ _, true) |>. all && w == (1 + (w.pred)).(* 2))

def student\_version (w : Nat) : Bool :=
  if w < 4 then false else (1 < w >>. iter (λ i, i.is\_multiple\_of 2) >>. map (λ _, true) |>. all && i != w)

def init (main : Nat) : Bool :=
  let a := nat.mk (i32.toNat <| externInt "x" <| fun x => x)
  let b := nat.mk (i32.toNat <| externInt "y" <| fun y => y)
  let loop : Nat → Nat → Option Nat := λ n m, ifHyp (n > 0) ∧ (n > m) ∨ (m < 0) then
    some (if (n > m) then (nat.mk (i32.toNat <| externInt "y" <| fun y => bitwise_not y)) else (nat.mk (pred (i32.toNat <| externInt "x" <| fun x => x)))
  let rec loop' : Nat → Option Nat := λ n, match loop n b with
    | none => some 0
    | some n' => loop' n'
  match loop' a with
    | none => false
    | some _ => true

def F := ∀ n, ¬(isZero n)

    have h'x : x > 0, from hx,
    have h'y : y < 0, from hy,
    have h' : x <= x, from rfl,
    have h' : y >= 0, from neg (neg y),
    contradiction,
    assumption,
  },
end

theorem check\_main : init → Bool := λ _, checkMainM (main _)

theorem theorem : check\_main init → true := sorry

theorem CHECK\_main : CHECK (init, LTL F) → true := sorry

open Lean.Elab.Tactic.Simple
open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactic

def init' (main : Name) : IO Unit := do
  let x ← pure <| randomInt ℤ.zero
  let y ← pure <| randomInt ℤ.zero
  pure (main x y)

def main (x : Int) (y : Int) : IO Unit := do
  while (y ≥ 0) do
    let old_y ← ref y
    y ← pure <| sub_int old_y 1
    if (y < 0) then do
      x ← pure <| randomInt ℤ.zero
      y ← randomInt ℤ.zero

let init := init' <$> constName "main"

def def_behavior : Prop := ∀ (x y : Int), x ≥ 0 ∧ y ≥ 0 → ∃ n : Int, x < n ∧ y < n

set_option pp.all true

def run : IO Unit := do
  have hInit : Init := init_function init
  have hDefBehavior : DecideablePredicate def_behavior := decideable_predicate def_behavior
  let ℛ := ltl_ranking ℤ.order_on (fun x => Int.to_nat x)
  have hLTL : LTL.Property (LTL.G (fun P => P.def_behavior)) ℛ := ltl_G_def_behavior hDefBehavior hInit
  let ℛ' := ranking_on ℤ.order_on (fun x => Int.to_nat x)
  have hInit' : Init := init_function (fun x y => pure (main x y))
  have hLTL' := ltl_G_def_behavior hDefBehavior (init' >>= fun _ => pure ())
  have hEqual : ℛ = ℛ' := rfl
  have hCheck : Init ∧ LTL.Property ℛ → Prop := λ (init ltl, _), CHECK (init, ltl)
  have hCheck' : Init ∧ LTL.Property ℛ' → Prop := λ (init ltl, _), CHECK (init, ltl)
  have hTrue : Prop := true

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactic.Simple
open Lean.Elab.Tactic.Context
open Lean.Util.Term
open Lean.Elab.Attributes

namespace Main

definition init : Unit := do
  let argv := ∫i in Nat.range 0 argc, argv.get! i
  let N := Lean.Expr.apply! (Lean.Int.toExpr! <| Lean.Nat.toInt! argv.get! 1)
  let a := Lean.Alloc.array! Nat.zero N
  let i := Lean.Alloc.const! Nat.zero
  match Lean.Nat.toInt! argv.get! 2 with
  | 0 := do
    for i ← Nat.range 0 N do
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! (Lean.Alloc.get! a i) (Lean.Int.toExpr! i)
  | 1 := do
    for i ← Nat.range 0 backwards N do
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! (Lean.Alloc.get! a i) (Lean.Int.toExpr! (N.succ i))
  | 2 := do
    for i ← Nat.range 0 N do
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! (Lean.Alloc.get! a i) (Lean.Int.toExpr! i)
    for i ← Nat.range 0 <| Lean.Sub.sub! N Nat.one do
      let r := Lean.Alloc.const! i
      let temp := Lean.Alloc.get! a i
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! a r
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! a i <| Lean.Alloc.get! a r
      Lean.Alloc.set_val! r temp
  let _ := bubblesort N a
  return ()

definition bubblesort (size : Nat) (a : Array Nat) : Unit := do
  for a_i ← Array.range a do
    for a_j ← Array.range (a.index a_i).succ do
      if a.get! a_j > a.get! a_i then do
        let t := a.get! a_i
        let b_j := a_j
        let b_i := a_i
        a.set! a_i (a.get! a_j)
        a.set! a_j t
  return ()

definition bubblesort1 (size : Nat) (a : Array Nat) : Unit := do
  for j ← Nat.range 1 size do
    let pivot := a.get! j
    let i := j - 1
    while i >= 0 ∧ a.get! i > pivot do
      let temp := a.get! (i + 1)
      a.set! (i + 1) a.get! i
      a.set! i temp
    a.set! (i + 1) pivot
  return ()

instance validFree : Property (init ∧ ∀ i, i < Nat.size! size → a.get! i = i) := do
  let ⊥ := false.toExpr
  let init_expr := init.toExpr
  let _ := Lean.Elab.withMainContext do
    let init_stx := Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseExpr init_expr
    let init_term := Lean.Elab.Tactic.normalize init_stx
    let init_norm := Lean.Elab.Tactic.reduce init_norm
    let a_expr := Array.map (Lean.Int.toExpr) Array.range 0 size
    let a_stx := Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseExpr <| Lean.String.join " " [init_term, "a"] ++ ":" ++ Lean.String.mkString " " a_expr
    let a_term := Lean.Elab.Tactic.normalize <| Lean.Elab.Tactic.mkApp (Lean.Elab.Tactic.getConstName "Array") [Lean.Nat.toExpr! size, Lean.Int.type.toExpr]
    let a_norm := Lean.Elab.Tactic.reduce a_term
    let free_prop := Lean.Expr.apply! (Lean.Const.getFn "valid_free") [init_norm, a_norm]
    let free_stx := Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseExpr <| Lean.String.join " " ["⟦", init_term, "⟧", "∧", Lean.String.mkString " " [Lean.String.mkString " " ["forall", Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseName "i", ":" ++ Lean.String.mkString " " ["Nat", "→"], Lean.String.mkString " " ["a", Lean.String.mkString " " ["i"]]] ++ " = i"] ++ "."] ++ " →" ++ free_prop.toLeaString
    let free_term := Lean.Elab.Tactic.normalize <| Lean.Elab.Tactic.mkApp (Lean.Elab.Tactic.getConstName "CHECK") [init_norm, Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseTerm free_stx]
    return free_term

instance validDeref : Property (init ∧ ∀ i, i < Nat.size! size → a.get! i ≠ ⊥) := do
  let ⊥ := Lean.Const.mkConst "false"
  let init_expr := init.toExpr
  let _ := Lean.Elab.withMainContext do
    let init_stx := Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseExpr init_expr
    let init_term := Lean.Elab.Tactic.normalize init_stx
    let a_expr := Array.map (Lean.Int.toExpr) Array.range 0 size
    let a_stx := Lean.Parser.Tactic.parseExpr <| Lean.String.join " " [init_term, "a"] ++ ":" ++ Lean.String.mkString " " a_expr

def init : IO Unit := do
  pure Unit

  let mut x : Nat := 0
  let mut i : Nat := 0

  begin

    y := newY

    fun j h => match σ j with
    | Some (x, y) => hx' j.1.2.1.1
    | None       => h
   end⟩

def arraySize : Nat := ∥∥
def a (i : Nat) : Box Nat := box ∥∥

def SelectionSort (a : Array Nat) : Unit :=
let i := ∀ i, 0 ≤ i < size a -- i : Nat
let mut i' := ∀ i, i
let mut min := i'
let j := ∀ j, i' < j < size a -- j : Nat
let mut minJ := j
do {

  {
    for j in j do
    {

        set minJ j
        set min j
    }
  }
  let temp := a [i'].get
  set a [i'] := a [min].get
  set a [min] := temp
}

  let mut arraySize := ℕ.randomR (ℕ.ofNat 100) (ℕ.mk Nat.maxInt)

def validMemtrack : Prop := ∀ i j, i < size a → j < size a → i ≠ j → a [i].get ≠ a [j].get -- Checks if there are no memory leaks

  let i''' := succ i'''

  let i‴ := succ i‴

  have h₅ := and.and h h' h'' h‴
  assume i : Nat
  assume h : 0 ≤ i < size a
  exact h₅

def validDerefProp := ∀ i h, h ∧ i < size a → validDeref a i h

  let h‴ := and.and h h' h''
  assume i : Nat

  exact h‴

  let h := ∥∥

open Lean Nat Array Functor.Basic

def SelectionSort (a : Array Int) (n : Nat) : Array Int :=
  let i := ref 0
  let mut temp : Int := 0
  let mut min : Nat := 0

  for i_1 := 0 until n - 1 do
    let j := i_1 + 1
    let min_1 := ref i_1

    for j_1 := j until n do
      if a.get! j < a.get! min_1 then do
        min_1 := j

    let temp_1 := a.get! i_1
    a.set! i_1 a.get! min_1
    a.set! min_1 temp_1

  a

def init (): Array Int := do
  let array_size := nat.nondet
  let a := Array.ofLen array_size 0

  pure ()

  sorry

theorem main : Init -> (FunLike.Const main).Property -> Prop :=
begin
  let n : Nat := uninterpret <$> (IO.runInit <$> init <*> pure main)
  let q : Nat := 0
  let p : Nat := 0
  let r : Nat := n
  let h : Nat := 0

  let q' : Nat := 4 * q
  let p' : Nat := p
  let r' : Nat := r

  let h' : Nat := if q > n then (
    let rec loop : Nat × Nat × Nat → Option Nat × Nat × Nat × Nat × Nat
      | (q, p, r, h, _) := if (q' <= n) then (
        let q'' : Nat := 4 * q'
        if (q'' > n) then (
          let h'' : Nat := p + q'
          let p'' : Nat := p / 2
          let r'' : Nat := if r >= h'' then (
            let h''' : Nat := p + q'
            let p''' : Nat := p / 2
            (some (q', p'', r'', h'', h'''))
          ) else (
            let p''' : Nat := p + q'
            let r''' : Nat := r - h''
            (some (q', p'', r'', h'', p''))
          )
        ) else (none (q, p, r, h, q''))
        loop q'' p'' r'' h'' (some.get loop.value)
      ) else none (q, p, r, h, q')
  ) else none (q, p, r, h, q)

  let h'' : Nat := match h' with
    some (q', p'', r'', h'', _) => h''
    none => h

  let r'' : Nat := r''

  have h2 : h * h * h - 12 * h * n + 16 * n * p + 12 * h * r - 16 * p * r - h - 4 * p = 0 := sorry

  let h4 : Nat := h'' * h'' * h'' - 12 * h'' * n + 16 * n * p'' + 12 * h'' * r'' - 16 * p'' * r'' - h'' - 4 * p''
  let h5 : Prop := h3 = h4

  let h7 : Nat := h4.symm.trans (h5.trans (p''.pow 2 - n + r''))
